description_long: This humanoid robot features a large, rounded head with two prominent, light blue oval eye panels and no visible mouth or nose. Its torso is black and broad-shouldered, with the word 'MECCANO' in red across the chest, suggesting a toy or educational robot. The arms and legs are cylindrical and light gray, with red bands at the knees and simple, rounded hands and feet. The robot's limbs are attached with visible joints, allowing for basic articulation. The overall design is stylized and cartoonish, with a smooth, hard exterior and minimal surface detailing. The robot stands upright and appears to be constructed primarily from plastic and metal components.
description: A stylized humanoid robot with a large, rounded head, blue eye panels, black torso, and gray cylindrical limbs with red knee bands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large head with blue eye panels, broad black torso with 'MECCANO' branding, and gray limbs with red knee bands.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the robot's slim profile, rounded head, and cylindrical arms and legs with visible joints.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and torso, with the gray arms and legs and red knee bands visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same slim profile, rounded head, and cylindrical limbs as the other side.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides and legs straight, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; the robot has integrated black, gray, and red panels as part of its body design.
attribute_facial_features: Large, rounded head with two prominent light blue oval eye panels; no visible mouth, nose, or expressive features.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible cylindrical joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, suggesting basic hinge articulation; hands and feet are simple and appear rigid.
